MSG.NAME: [BLE]server add characteristic cbk server_id: %u status: %u srv_hdl: %hu char_hdl: %hu value_handle: %hu uuid_len: %u uuid: %02x%02x @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(62),INFO
[BLE]server add descriptor server: %u status: %u srv_hdl: %hu desc_hdl: %hu uuid_len:%u, uuid: @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(85),INFO
[BLE]server read req server: %u status: %u conn_id:%hu handle: %hu @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(104),INFO
[BLE]server write req server: %u status: %u conn_id:%hu handle: %hu @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(111),INFO
[BLE]server mtu change server: %u status: %u conn_id: %u mtu_size: %u @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(133),INFO
[BLE]client discovery service cbk client_id: %u conn_id: %hu status: %u uuid: 0x%02x%02x @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(158),INFO
[BLE]client discovery character cbk client_id: %u conn_id: %hu status: %u uuid: 0x%02x%02x @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(188),INFO
[BLE]client discovery descriptor cbk client_id: %u conn_id: %hu status: %u uuid: 0x%02x%02x @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(214),INFO
[BLE]client read cbk client_id: %u conn_id: %hu status: 0x%x handle: %lu @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(227),INFO
[BLE]client write cbk client_id: %u conn_id: %hu status: %d handle: %hu @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(236),INFO
[BLE]client notification cbk client_id: %u conn_id: %hu status: %u handle: %hu @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(246),INFO
[BLE]client MTU changed cbk: status: %u client_id: %u conn_id: %u mtu:%u. @ble_gatts_callbacks.c(258),INFO
